utility_evaluation.REASONING: First, count the number of items required in the format: there are six items—property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. Next, check the final property solution to see if all six are present and fully specified. The solution includes: (1) property—details such as name, address, type, bedrooms, bathrooms, size, price, accessibility, fees, and amenities are all clearly specified; (2) financing—method, total equity used, closing costs, and total outlay are included; (3) legal_services—provider, cost, and list of services are included; (4) moving_services—provider, cost, and list of services are included; (5) setup_services—utilities, setup cost, and notes are included; (6) total_budget—complete breakdown with all cost components and totals are included. Each item is fully specified according to the format.
